name: Summer Circus Spectacular
hours_label: Tue–Fri 11 AM & 2 PM, Sat 2 & 5 PM · $20 adults / $15 kids
blurb: The Circus Arts Conservatory and The Ringling present world-class circus artists in the jewel-box Historic Asolo Theater. A Sarasota summer tradition that thrills all ages — add the Circus Museum for just $5 more. Tickets $20 adults, $15 children 12 and under.

name: Marvin: A Marvin Gaye Revue
hours_label: 7:30 PM Tue–Sat, 2 PM Sat–Sun · $54 adults / $24 students & military
blurb: Nate Jacobs' brand-new musical celebration of Marvin Gaye — 'How Sweet It Is,' 'Heard It Through the Grapevine' and more — before the production heads to the International Black Theatre Festival. Final Sarasota week; tickets $54 adults, $24 students and active military.

name: Siesta Key Drum Circle
blurb: Siesta Key's famous Sunday drum circle gathers on the quartz sand south of the pavilion about an hour before sunset. Drummers, dancers and a spectacular Gulf sunset — free and unforgettable.

name: Sarasota Farmers Market
address: Lemon Ave & Main St, Sarasota, FL 34236
blurb: Downtown's beloved Saturday ritual: dozens of vendors with fresh produce, flowers, baked goods and local makers along Lemon Avenue and Main Street. Free to stroll, dog-friendly and a perfect morning before the beach.
